CarnivalPenguin.name: Carnival Penguin
CarnivalPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever you play your third Action this Cycle,
choose a Penguin with vibe 6 or less.
Ice that Penguin.

ChefPenguin.name: Chef Penguin
ChefPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever you play a Red Action, you get a Fishsicle.
(A Fishsicle produces one _T_, then goes away).

ChubWhoLivesforAction.name: Chub, Who Lives for Action
ChubWhoLivesforAction.rulesText:
Whenever you play a Red Action,
put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

ChubopolisUnleashed.name: Chubopolis Unleashed
ChubopolisUnleashed.rulesText:
Whenever you play a Red Action, put 2 vibe counters
on this Penguin. When this Penguin is iced from play,
draw cards equal to half the number of vibe counters
 on this Penguin rounded up.

InsomniacPenguin.name: Insomniac Penguin
InsomniacPenguin.rulesText: Whenever you play an Action, unflop this Penguin.

JugglingPenguin.name: Juggling Penguin
JugglingPenguin.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
This Penguin doesn't unflop at the Unfloppening.
At the end of Action Time, if you played an Action,
unflop this Penguin.

KeyturningPenguin.name: Keyturning Penguin
KeyturningPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
look at the top card of your deck.
You may put it on the bottom of your deck.

MukbangPenguin.name: Mukbang Penguin
MukbangPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
the next time you would draw a card, skip it.

PeaceOutPenguin.name: Peace Out Penguin
PeaceOutPenguin.rulesText:
This Penguin can only [ACT]
if you've played a Red Action this Cycle.
[ACT] _F_: Choose up to two Penguins with
total vibe 10 or less. Ice those Penguins
and this Penguin.

PopcornPenguin.name: Popcorn Penguin
PopcornPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
ice the Penguin in play that's vibing the least.
If there's a tie, you pick.

RedMegaPenguin.name: Red Mega Penguin
RedMegaPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a Penguin in your huddle. Whenever an Action
is played that chooses this Penguin, copy that Action.
(You make new choices for the copy).

RibbonDancingPenguin.name: Ribbon-Dancing Penguin
RibbonDancingPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever you play a Red Action,
this Penguin can produce _R__R_ for the rest of this Cycle.

RiskTakingPenguin.name: Risk-Taking Penguin
RiskTakingPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
choose a Penguin with vibe 6 or less and flip a coin.
If heads, return the chosen Penguin
to its owner's hand.

RunItBackPenguin.name: Run-It-Back Penguin
RunItBackPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Pick a Red Action card in your ice
and return it to your hand. Ice this Penguin.

ScreamingPenguin.name: Screaming Penguin
ScreamingPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever you play an Action,
boost this Penguin's vibe by 2
for the rest of this Cycle.

SerenePenguin.name: Serene Penguin
SerenePenguin.rulesText:
Whenever your opponent plays an Action,
flop this Penguin.

StrikingSwordsmanPenguin.name: Striking Swordsman Penguin
StrikingSwordsmanPenguin.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: This Penguin can't be iced this Cycle.

ADropinAttention.name: A Drop in Attention
ADropinAttention.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if it's the fourth
Action you've played this Cycle.
Ice all Penguins.

AgainAgain.name: Again, Again
AgainAgain.rulesText:
The next time you play an Action
with Pudge cost _R__R_ this Cycle, copy that Action.
(You make new choices for the copy).

BearishSentiment.name: Bearish Sentiment
BearishSentiment.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin.
It loses all abilities for the rest of this Cycle.
Draw a card.

BestSeatsintheHouse.name: Best Seats in the House
BestSeatsintheHouse.rulesText: If you have no cards in hand, draw two cards.

GrowTogether.name: Grow Together
GrowTogether.rulesText:
Each player may choose a Penguin.
Put a vibe counter on each of those Penguins.
Draw a card.

HaveanEncore.name: Have an Encore
HaveanEncore.rulesText:
You can only play this Action
if you've played another Red Action this Cycle.
Choose up to two Red Penguins in your huddle
and unflop those Penguins. Draw a card.

front.name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose

HeadsIWinTailsYouLose.name: Heads I Win, Tails You Lose
HeadsIWinTailsYouLose.rulesText:
Choose a player and flip a coin. If heads,
you draw a card. If tails, the chosen player
ices a card from their hand.

HittheHighNote.name: Hit the High Note
HittheHighNote.rulesText:
Choose a Relic and return it to its owner's hand.
Draw a card.

NotaRodAnymore.name: Not a Rod Anymore!
NotaRodAnymore.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if it's face-down
as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it.
Choose a Penguin and boost its vibe
by 2 for the rest of this Cycle.

PutonaShow.name: Put on a Show
PutonaShow.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin with vibe 10 or greater.
Ice that Penguin.

StandintheRain.name: Stand in the Rain
StandintheRain.rulesText: Unflop all Penguins. Draw a card.

SunburnaPenguin.name: Sunburn a Penguin
SunburnaPenguin.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin with vibe
4 or less. Ice that Penguin.

TrustFall.name: Trust Fall
TrustFall.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin.
Reduce its vibe by 2 for the rest of this Cycle.
If that Penguin has 0 vibe, it can't be iced this Cycle.
Draw a card.

UseWhoopeeCushion.name: Use Whoopee Cushion
UseWhoopeeCushion.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin with vibe 10 or greater.
Reduce its vibe by 4 for the rest of this Cycle.
Draw a card.

DashingSwordsmanPenguin.name: Dashing Swordsman Penguin
DashingSwordsmanPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time, if you don't have
the Baron, boost this Penguin's vibe by 4
for the rest of this Cycle.

DaydreamingPenguin.name: Daydreaming Penguin
DaydreamingPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin with vibe 2 or less.
Ice that Penguin and ice this Penguin.

ExtrovertPenguin.name: Extrovert Penguin
ExtrovertPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever another Penguin enters your huddle,
put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

HyperPenguin.name: Hyper Penguin
HyperPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever a Penguin in your huddle wins
Vibe Check, reveal the top card of your deck.
If it's a Yellow Penguin card, put it into your hand.
If you do, ice a card from your hand.

JubilantPenguin.name: Jubilant Penguin
JubilantPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever a Penguin in your huddle
wins Vibe Check, draw a card.

LuckyPenguin.name: Lucky Penguin
LuckyPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin is put in your ice from play,
you may pick a Yellow Penguin card in your ice
with vibe 2 or less and put it into your huddle.

MysteriousPenguin.name: Mysterious Penguin
MysteriousPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
if there are four or more Yellow Penguins
in your huddle including this one,
choose a Penguin and flop it.

NapengulonLegendaryHost.name: Napengulon, Legendary Host
NapengulonLegendaryHost.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
put vibe counters on this Penguin equal to
the number of Yellow Penguins in your huddle.

PaperPenguin.name: Paper Penguin
PaperPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever another Rock, Paper, or Scissor Penguin
enters a huddle, put a vibe counter on this Penguin.
Rock Penguins do not participate in Vibe Check.

PenguinThatDoesntMindGoodbyes.name: Penguin That Doesn't Mind Goodbyes
PenguinThatDoesntMindGoodbyes.rulesText:
Whenever another Yellow Penguin
in your huddle is iced, draw a card.

front.name: Penguin Who Might Bring a Plus One

PenguinWhoMightBringaPlusOne.name: Penguin Who Might Bring a Plus One
PenguinWhoMightBringaPlusOne.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
reveal the top card of your deck. If it's
a Penguin card with Fish cost 2 or less,
draw it. If not, put it on the bottom
of your deck.

PenguinWhoSpillstheTea.name: Penguin Who Spills the Tea
PenguinWhoSpillstheTea.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Pick a Yellow Penguin card in your ice
with vibe 4 or less. Return it to your hand
and return this Penguin to its owner's hand.

PenguinWhoZooms.name: Penguin Who Zooms
PenguinWhoZooms.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
return a non-Speedy Penguin from your huddle
to its owner's hand.

front.name: Penguin Who's Late to the Party

PenguinWhosLatetotheParty.name: Penguin Who's Late to the Party
PenguinWhosLatetotheParty.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
if your huddle has at least three more Penguins
than your opponent's huddle including this Penguin,
it enters with 6 vibe counters.

ShockingPenguin.name: Shocking Penguin
ShockingPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
return each other Penguin in your huddle
to its owner's hand.

PotStirringPenguin.name: Pot-Stirring Penguin
PotStirringPenguin.rulesText:
As long as your huddle has three or more Penguins,
including this one, this Penguin can produce _Y__Y_.

RockPenguin.name: Rock Penguin
RockPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever another Rock, Paper, or Scissor Penguin
enters a huddle, put a vibe counter on this Penguin.
Scissors Penguins do not participate in Vibe Check.

ScissorsPenguin.name: Scissors Penguin
ScissorsPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever another Rock, Paper, or Scissor Penguin
enters a huddle, put a vibe counter on this Penguin.
Paper Penguins do not participate in Vibe Check.

Shapenguzad.name: Shapenguzad
Shapenguzad.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
When this Penguin enters the huddle, move all
vibe counters from all Penguins in your huddle
onto this Penguin.

PleepemWhoStandsAlone.name: Pleepem, Who Stands Alone
PleepemWhoStandsAlone.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
put 2 vibe counters on it for each other
Yellow Penguin in your huddle.

ShyPenguin.name: Shy Penguin
ShyPenguin.rulesText:
You can only play this Penguin
if you've played another Penguin this turn.

YellowMegaPenguin.name: Yellow Mega Penguin
YellowMegaPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a Penguin in your huddle. When this Penguin
enters the huddle, reveal the top card of your deck.
If it's a Yellow Penguin card, put it into your huddle.

BuddyUp.name: Buddy Up
BuddyUp.rulesText:
For the rest of this Cycle,
Yellow Penguins in your huddle gain the ability
"[ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin and flop it".

ChecktheYellowPages.name: Check the Yellow Pages
ChecktheYellowPages.rulesText:
Reveal the top three cards of your deck.
Put all the Yellow Penguin cards you reveal
into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom
of your deck in any order.

front.name: Put Your Flippers in the Air

PutYourFlippersintheAir.name: Put Your Flippers in the Air
PutYourFlippersintheAir.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin.
Boost its vibe by twice the number of
Yellow Penguins in your huddle
for the rest of this Cycle.

JointheTrend.name: Join the Trend
JointheTrend.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your huddle and ice it.
Turn the top card of your deck into a Rod.
Return this Action to your hand.

NotYourKeys.name: Not Your Keys
NotYourKeys.rulesText: Choose a Penguin and ice it.

PrepareforaWildNight.name: Prepare for a Wild Night
PrepareforaWildNight.rulesText:
Reveal the top five cards of your deck.
Put all the Action cards you reveal into your hand.
 Put the rest on the bottom of your deck in any order.

TheyreTwins.name: They're Twins
TheyreTwins.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your huddle.
Search your deck for a Penguin card
with the same name and put it into your hand.
Shuffle your deck.

WhataTwist.name: What a Twist!
WhataTwist.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if it's face-down
as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it.
Choose a Penguin and unflop it.

BalancedPenguin.name: Balanced Penguin
BalancedPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _G__G_, _F_: You get a Fishsicle.
(A Fishsicle produces one _T_, then goes away).

FlowerArrangingPenguin.name: Flower-Arranging Penguin
FlowerArrangingPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever a Penguin in your huddle wins Vibe Check,
put two vibe counters on that Penguin.

GreenMegaPenguin.name: Green Mega Penguin
GreenMegaPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a Penguin in your huddle. This Penguin can't
be chosen by anything. At the start of Action Time,
put a vibe counter on this Penguin.

KaratePenguin.name: Karate Penguin
KaratePenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a card from your hand.

PeppyPenguin.name: Peppy Penguin

OrnateSwordsmanPenguin.name: Ornate Swordsman Penguin
OrnateSwordsmanPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever this Penguin wins Vibe Check,
each opponent chooses a Penguin in their huddle.
Ice those Penguins.

PenguininColor.name: Penguin in Color
PenguininColor.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
you get a Fishsicle. (A Fishsicle produces one _T_,
then goes away).

PenguinWhoIstheGarden.name: Penguin Who Is the Garden
PenguinWhoIstheGarden.rulesText:
Whenever this Penguin wins Vibe Check,
the loser of Vibe Check skips the next time
they would draw a card.

PenguinWhoseGardenGrows.name: Penguin Whose Garden Grows
PenguinWhoseGardenGrows.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
if another Penguin in your huddle is, or is tied with,
the Penguin in play that's vibing the most,
boost this Penguin's vibe by 6
for the rest of this Cycle.

PenguinWithGreatMystique.name: Penguin With Great Mystique
PenguinWithGreatMystique.rulesText:
This Penguin doesn't participate in Vibe Check.
[ACT] _F_: Put 6 vibe counters on this Penguin.

KoiPenguin.name: Koi Penguin
KoiPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
choose a Penguin with the highest vibe in your huddle
and put vibe counters on it until it's tied
for the highest vibe among all Penguins.

SketchingPenguin.name: Sketching Penguin
SketchingPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time, choose a Penguin
and boost its vibe by 4 for the rest of this Cycle.
If you lose or tie Vibe Check, ice Sketching Penguin.

SlidingPenguin.name: Sliding Penguin
SlidingPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time, choose a Penguin
and boost its vibe by 2 for the rest of this Cycle.

StargazingPenguin.name: Stargazing Penguin
StargazingPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
choose a Penguin with vibe 6 or less
and put a vibe counter on it.

SuccessPenguin.name: Success Penguin
SuccessPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose another Penguin in your huddle.
Boost that Penguin's vibe by 6 for the rest of this Cycle
and ice this Penguin.

WindowWashingPenguin.name: Window-Washing Penguin
WindowWashingPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
choose a Penguin in your huddle
and put 4 vibe counters on it.

ChiselfromStone.name: Chisel from Stone
ChiselfromStone.rulesText:
Choose a Green Penguin in your huddle.
Count its vibe, divide it by four, and round up.
Draw that many cards.

CleanUpGood.name: Clean Up Good
CleanUpGood.rulesText:
Choose a Green Penguin in your huddle.
Unflop it and double its vibe
for the rest of this Cycle.

EscapeinTime.name: Escape in Time
EscapeinTime.rulesText:
Cancel an [ACT] or Action
that chooses a Penguin in your huddle.

EverybodyStayClam.name: Everybody Stay Clam
EverybodyStayClam.rulesText: Flop all Penguins in play. Draw a card.

GotEm.name: Got 'Em!
GotEm.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if it's face-down
as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it.
Choose a Penguin with vibe 2 or less.
Ice that Penguin.

LostintheSauce.name: Lost in the Sauce
LostintheSauce.rulesText: Choose a Penguin and put 2 vibe counters on it.

RaidtheSnacks.name: Raid the Snacks
RaidtheSnacks.rulesText:
You get two Fishsicles.
(A Fishsicle produces one _T_, then goes away).

LucaSavesthePenguins.name: Luca Saves the Penguins
LucaSavesthePenguins.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your opponent's huddle.
It joins your huddle.

SendOff.name: Send Off
SendOff.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your huddle. Ice that Penguin.
You get Fishsicles equal to half that Penguin's vibe,
rounded up. (A Fishsicle produces one _T_,
then goes away).

TooCoolforSchool.name: Too Cool for School
TooCoolforSchool.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if there's
a Penguin in your huddle that's vibing more than
your opponent's highest vibing Penguin
by 6 or more. Ice all Penguins.

WalktheRunway.name: Walk the Runway
WalktheRunway.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your huddle
and a Penguin in your opponent's huddle.
Ice the one that's vibing the least.
If there's a tie, ice them both.

YouDroppedThis.name: You Dropped This
YouDroppedThis.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Action,
ice a Penguin in your huddle with vibe
6 or greater. Choose a Penguin and put
6 vibe counters on it.

BashfulSwordsmanPenguin.name: Bashful Swordsman Penguin
BashfulSwordsmanPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever a Penguin wins Vibe Check,
if this Penguin is unflopped, ice that Penguin.
(They still win Vibe Check).

BlueMegaPenguin.name: Blue Mega Penguin
BlueMegaPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a Penguin in your huddle. You can look
at the top card of your deck at any time.
If it's a Relic card, you can play it.

BottlePenguin.name: Bottle Penguin
BottlePenguin.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Ice the top card of each player's deck.

CannonballPenguin.name: Cannonball Penguin
CannonballPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle, choose a player.
Ice the top three cards of their deck.

ThawingPenguin.name: Thawing Penguin
ThawingPenguin.rulesText:
Penguins can't win Vibe Check
unless their vibe is greater than four times
the number of Thawing Penguins in your huddle.

DragonriderPenguin.name: Dragonrider Penguin
DragonriderPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
you may pick a card in your opponent's ice
and put it on top of their deck.

FactFindingPenguin.name: Fact-Finding Penguin
FactFindingPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever an Action card
is put in your opponent's ice from their deck,
put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

JealousPenguin.name: Jealous Penguin
JealousPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
pick a Penguin card in your opponent's ice
and put that card on top of this one. This Penguin
inherits all characteristics of that card.

MissChiefKeeperofKeys.name: Miss Chief, Keeper of Keys
MissChiefKeeperofKeys.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose an opponent. Ice cards
from the top of their deck equal to
half this Penguin's vibe, rounded up.

MissPlaceForgetterofThings.name: Miss Place, Forgetter of Things
MissPlaceForgetterofThings.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
pick a card in your opponent's ice.
Cards with the same name as that card can't be
played while this Penguin is in your huddle.

PainterPenguin.name: Painter Penguin
PainterPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
pick four Action cards in your ice and put them
on the bottom of your deck.

PenguinCaughtinFishingLine.name: Penguin Caught in Fishing Line
PenguinCaughtinFishingLine.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Flop all Penguins. Ice this Penguin.

PenguinWhoExplorestheReef.name: Penguin Who Explores the Reef
PenguinWhoExplorestheReef.rulesText:
Whenever a Penguin in your huddle
wins Vibe Check, choose an opponent.
Ice cards from the top of that player's deck
equal to half that Penguin's vibe, rounded up.

PenguinWhosOK.name: Penguin Who's OK
PenguinWhosOK.rulesText:
Whenever you draw a card, choose a player.
Ice the top card of their deck.

PortholePenguin.name: Porthole Penguin
PortholePenguin.rulesText:
Whenever you lose the Baron,
look at the top card of your opponent's deck.
You may put it on the bottom of their deck.

RadChillWhosSuperCool.name: Rad Chill, Who's Super Cool
RadChillWhosSuperCool.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
[ACT] _F_: Choose an opponent.
Ice cards from the top of their deck
equal to the number of cards
that player already has in their ice.

SneakyPenguin.name: Sneaky Penguin
SneakyPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of your turn,
look at the top card of your deck.
You may put it on the bottom of your deck.

TidalPenguin.name: Tidal Penguin
TidalPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose an opponent and ice all cards
in their hand. They draw that many cards, then
ice that many cards from the top of their deck.

WaterfallPenguin.name: Waterfall Penguin
WaterfallPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
if you don't have the Baron, choose an opponent.
Ice the top three cards of their deck.

BedtimeStory.name: Bedtime Story
BedtimeStory.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin with vibe less than
or equal to twice the number of Penguin cards
its controller has in their ice. Ice that Penguin.

BridgeWithLayerZero.name: Bridge With Layer Zero
BridgeWithLayerZero.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your opponent's huddle.
Swap it with a Penguin card in its owner's ice.
(That Penguin enters the huddle, but is not played).

CoolStoryBro.name: Cool Story Bro!
CoolStoryBro.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if it's face-down
as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose
a player and ice the top two cards of their deck.

DontTrustVerify.name: Don't Trust, Verify
DontTrustVerify.rulesText:
Name a card. Reveal the top card of your deck.
If it's the named card, put it into your hand
and draw an additional card. Otherwise,
put it back on top of your deck.

IngeniousIdea.name: Ingenious Idea
IngeniousIdea.rulesText:
Draw two cards. Pick a card in your hand
and put it on top of your deck.

KeepDigging.name: Keep Digging
KeepDigging.rulesText:
Choose an opponent. They reveal their hand.
Pick a non-Penguin card from it and ice that card.

QuestionableMethods.name: Questionable Methods
QuestionableMethods.rulesText:
Pick an Action card in your opponent's ice.
Until the end of this Cycle, you can play that Action.
You can spend Pudge of any color to play that Action.

SendItTooHard.name: Send It Too Hard
SendItTooHard.rulesText:
You can only play this Action
if your opponent has fifteen or more
cards in their ice. Ice all Penguins.

SpringaLeak.name: Spring a Leak
SpringaLeak.rulesText: Choose an Action and cancel it.

ThreeWisePenguins.name: Three Wise Penguins
ThreeWisePenguins.rulesText:
Choose two Rods you don't control
and return each to its owner's hand.

UnlikelyFriends.name: Unlikely Friends
UnlikelyFriends.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your opponent's huddle.
That player may ice cards from the top of their deck
equal to that Penguin's vibe. If they do not,
 ice that Penguin.

AbsentMindedPenguin.name: Absent-Minded Penguin
AbsentMindedPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin in your huddle and ice it.
Put two vibe counters on this Penguin.

AbstractPenguin.name: Abstract Penguin
AbstractPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_, Ice a card from your hand:
Put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

AmbitiousPenguin.name: Ambitious Penguin
AmbitiousPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever a player plays an Action,
if this Penguin is unflopped and
you have less than fifteen cards in your ice,
 return this Penguin to its owner's hand.

AscendingPenguin.name: Ascending Penguin
AscendingPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever a Penguin enters your huddle,
ice cards from the top of your deck equal to
half that Penguin's vibe, rounded up.

BizmoPhDCandidate.name: Bizmo, PhD Candidate

BrainyPenguin.name: Brainy Penguin
BrainyPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
ice up to two cards in your hand.
Draw that many cards.

BubblestheGreatandPowerful.name: Bubbles, the Great and Powerful
BubblestheGreatandPowerful.rulesText:
This Penguin's vibe is equal to
twice the number of Penguin cards in your ice.

BunkusWhoIstheStars.name: Bunkus, Who Is the Stars
BunkusWhoIstheStars.rulesText:
Playable from ice. As you play Bunkus,
put any number of cards from your ice on the bottom
of your deck to reduce Bunkus' cost by that amount.
Bunkus' vibe is twice the number of
Penguin cards in your ice.

CharmingSwordsmanPenguin.name: Charming Swordsman Penguin
CharmingSwordsmanPenguin.rulesText:
This Penguin can only [ACT] if its vibe is,
or is tied with, the highest vibe in your huddle.
[ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin
in your opponent's huddle and flop it.

CookingPenguin.name: Cooking Penguin
CookingPenguin.rulesText:
Playable from ice by icing a Rod you control
in addition to paying its Fish cost.

DemolitionPenguin.name: Demolition Penguin
DemolitionPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
you may pick a card in your ice.
If you do, put it face-down as a Rod
and ice a Rod you control.

GalaxyPenguin.name: Galaxy Penguin
GalaxyPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
search your deck for a Penguin card
and put it in your ice. Shuffle your deck.

GardenkeeperPenguin.name: Gardenkeeper Penguin
GardenkeeperPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
pick five cards in your ice and put them
on the bottom of your deck. When this Penguin
enters the huddle, ice the top five cards of your deck.

PenguinWithaFlag.name: Penguin With a Flag
PenguinWithaFlag.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a Rod you control.

front.name: Penguin Who Breaks the Fourth Wall

PenguinWhoBreakstheFourthWall.name: Penguin Who Breaks the Fourth Wall
PenguinWhoBreakstheFourthWall.rulesText:
You can't play this Penguin from your
hand. Playable from ice by icing two Rods
you control in addition to paying its Fish cost.

PenguinWhoCarriestheBerg.name: Penguin Who Carries the Berg
PenguinWhoCarriestheBerg.rulesText:
Whenever one of your Rods is iced from play,
put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

PenguinWhoRunstheLift.name: Penguin Who Runs the Lift
PenguinWhoRunstheLift.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
if there are eight or more cards in your ice,
boost this Penguin's vibe by 6
for the rest of this Cycle.

ProsperousPenguin.name: Prosperous Penguin
ProsperousPenguin.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
you may pick an Action card in your ice with
Pudge cost 2. If you do, you can play it this Cycle.
(You must still pay its costs).

PurpleMegaPenguin.name: Purple Mega Penguin
PurpleMegaPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a Penguin in your huddle. When this Penguin
enters the huddle, you may pick a card in your ice
and put it into your hand.

SpaceCadetPenguin.name: Space Cadet Penguin
SpaceCadetPenguin.rulesText:
As an additional cost to play this Penguin,
ice a card from your hand. When this Penguin
enters the huddle, choose a Rod you control
and a Rod you don't control. Ice those Rods.

AdventureSquad.name: Adventure Squad
AdventureSquad.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin in your huddle
and a Penguin in your opponent's huddle.
Ice the one that's vibing the most.
If there's a tie, ice them both.

ChangePerspective.name: Change Perspective
ChangePerspective.rulesText:
Reveal the top three cards of your deck.
Your opponent separates those into two groups.
Pick one group and put it into your hand.
Ice the cards in the other group.

ChaseYourDreams.name: Chase Your Dreams
ChaseYourDreams.rulesText:
You can't play this Action from your hand.
Playable from ice. Draw a card, then put this Action
on the bottom of your deck.

GatherTogether.name: Gather Together
GatherTogether.rulesText:
Pick a Penguin card in your ice. During your next turn,
you can play that card by icing a Rod you control
in addition to paying its Fish cost.

HaveaPhilosophicalDebate.name: Have a Philosophical Debate
HaveaPhilosophicalDebate.rulesText:
Choose a Penguin. You may move cards
from your ice to the bottom of your deck
equal to that Penguin's Fish cost.
If you do, ice that Penguin.

OneWithHistory.name: One With History
OneWithHistory.rulesText: Return all Penguin cards in your ice to your hand.

OverwhelmWithKnowledge.name: Overwhelm With Knowledge
OverwhelmWithKnowledge.rulesText:
Playable from ice by icing a Rod you control
instead of paying this card's Pudge cost.
If you play this Action from your ice,
put this card on the bottom of your deck.
Draw a card.

SickPull.name: Sick Pull!
SickPull.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if it's face-down
as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it.
Each player draws a card.

SpringBreak.name: Spring Break
SpringBreak.rulesText:
You can only play this Action if you have
fifteen or more cards in your ice.
Ice all Penguins.

StudyAllNight.name: Study All Night
StudyAllNight.rulesText: Draw two cards. Ice two cards from your hand.

Wut.name: Wut?
Wut.rulesText:
When this card is put in your ice,
ice the top card of your deck.

AhaPenguin.name: Aha Penguin
AhaPenguin.rulesText:
Whenever an opponent wins Vibe Check,
put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

BoatTyingPenguin.name: Boat-Tying Penguin
BoatTyingPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin with vibe
equal to or less than the number of
Penguins in your huddle and put
2 vibe counters on it.

HungryPenguin.name: Hungry Penguin
HungryPenguin.rulesText:
[ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin with vibe greater than
this Penguin's vibe and flop it.

InquisitivePenguin.name: Inquisitive Penguin
InquisitivePenguin.rulesText: This Penguin doesn't participate in Vibe Check.

IntrovertPenguin.name: Introvert Penguin
IntrovertPenguin.rulesText:
This Penguin doesn't participate in Vibe Check
unless it's the only Penguin in your huddle.

PrimoWizardPenguin.name: Primo Wizard Penguin
PrimoWizardPenguin.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
This Penguin can produce _RB_ of any color.

front.name: Penguin With a Rod of His Own

PenguinWithaRodofHisOwn.name: Penguin With a Rod of His Own
PenguinWithaRodofHisOwn.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
This Penguin can produce _T_ as if it were a Rod.

TeleporterPenguin.name: Teleporter Penguin
TeleporterPenguin.rulesText:
At the start of your turn,
ice all Penguins with vibe 4 or less.
This Penguin can't have vibe counters placed on it.

SkydivingPenguin.name: Skydiving Penguin
SkydivingPenguin.rulesText: Whenever the Baron changes sides, draw a card.

SupportiveFriend.name: Supportive Friend
SupportiveFriend.rulesText:
When this Penguin enters the huddle,
you may choose a Penguin
and put 2 vibe counters on it.

ChaliceofEverflowingPudge.name: Chalice of Everflowing Pudge
ChaliceofEverflowingPudge.rulesText:
When you play this Relic, pick a color.
Penguins in your huddle can produce Pudge of that color.

CookiesofTruth.name: Cookies of Truth
CookiesofTruth.rulesText:
Players play with the top card
of their deck revealed.

DummyThiccDiscoBall.name: Dummy Thicc Disco Ball
DummyThiccDiscoBall.rulesText:
At the start of your turn, return all Penguins
in your opponent's huddles to their owner's hands.

InspiringStory.name: Inspiring Story
InspiringStory.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time, boost the vibe
of every Penguin in your huddle by 2
for the rest of this Cycle.

LayerTwoTechnology.name: Layer Two Technology
LayerTwoTechnology.rulesText: All Penguin cards cost one less _T_ to play.

OrbofHopium.name: Orb of Hopium
OrbofHopium.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
each player draws a card.

SilentSnowGlobe.name: Silent Snow Globe
SilentSnowGlobe.rulesText:
All Penguins lose all abilities.
You can't play additional Penguins
as long as this Relic remains in play.
(Penguins can still produce Pudge).

TheEndoftheRainbow.name: The End of the Rainbow

TooMuchCaffeine.name: Too Much Caffeine
TooMuchCaffeine.rulesText:
At the start of Action Time,
each player may choose a Penguin.
Flop those Penguins.

WizardCap.name: Wizard Cap
WizardCap.rulesText:
Whenever a Wizard Penguin produces Pudge,
they produce another Pudge of that same color.

BounceHouseRod.name: Bounce House Rod
BounceHouseRod.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
When you play this Rod, return
a Rod you control to its owner's hand.
(You can look at your face-down Rods at any time).

CalligraphyRod.name: Calligraphy Rod
CalligraphyRod.rulesText:
You can only play this Rod if you control
five or more Rods. Whenever you play
your second Penguin this Cycle,
unflop this Rod.

FreezingRod.name: Freezing Rod
FreezingRod.rulesText:
This Rod produces _T__T_.
Whenever you use this Rod, ice a Rod you control.

HotRod.name: Hot Rod
HotRod.rulesText:
You can only play this Rod if you control
five or more Rods. At the start of Action Time,
boost the vibe of the Penguin in your huddle
with the highest vibe by 1 for the rest of this Cycle.
If there's a tie, you pick.

PudgyManRod.name: Pudgy Man Rod
PudgyManRod.rulesText:
Whenever another one of your rods is iced from play
unflop this rod.

RodofCamaraderie.name: Rod of Camaraderie
RodofCamaraderie.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
As an additional cost to play this Rod,
ice three unflopped Rods you control.
This Rod produces _T_ for each Penguin in your huddle.

UmbrellaRod.name: Umbrella Rod
UmbrellaRod.rulesText:
You can only play this Rod if you control
five or more Rods. Whenever you play
your fourth Action each Cycle, copy it.
(You make new choices for the copy).

RodofCheesySlices.name: Rod of Cheesy Slices
RodofCheesySlices.rulesText:
You can only play this Rod if you control
five or more Rods. Whenever you use this Rod,
choose an opponent and ice the top two cards
of their deck.

TrampolineRod.name: Trampoline Rod
TrampolineRod.rulesText:
Enters flopped.
When you play this Rod, return a Penguin
in your huddle to its owner's hand.

RodofCharmingMelodies.name: Rod of Charming Melodies
RodofCharmingMelodies.rulesText:
You can only play this Rod if you control
five or more Rods. Whenever you use this Rod,
ice the top two cards of your deck.

LilShaker.name: Lil Shaker
LilShaker.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, pick two cards in your ice and put them on the bottom of your deck: Choose a Red Penguin. That Penguin produces _R__R__R_ for the rest of this Cycle.

LilWhoBreaksFree.name: Lil Who Breaks Free
LilWhoBreaksFree.rulesText: Whenever this Penguin leaves the huddle, draw a card.

LilDaydreamer.name: Lil Daydreamer
LilDaydreamer.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Penguin with vibe 3 or less. Ice that Penguin and ice this Penguin.

TheLordOfLightning.name: The Lord of Lightning
TheLordOfLightning.rulesText: Whenever a Lil in your huddle is flopped, boost this Penguin's vibe by 1 for the rest of this Cycle.

LilSinger.name: Lil Singer
LilSinger.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Choose another unflopped Penguin in your huddle and flop it. Put a vibe counter on that Penguin.

SquibblestoneTheWise.name: Squibblestone the Wise
SquibblestoneTheWise.rulesText: [ACT] _R__B_, _F_: Choose a flopped Lil and ice it.

LilComic.name: Lil Comic
LilComic.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, choose a player. That player reveals their hand. You may pick a Penguin card from their hand and ice it. If you do, that player draws a card.

PenguinWhoShakes.name: Penguin Who Shakes
PenguinWhoShakes.rulesText: Whenever you play a Red Action, put a vibe counter on this Penguin. As long as it has 3 or more vibe counters, it produces _R__R__R_ and has  the ability "Whenever this Penguin is flopped, remove 3 vibe counters from it".

LilIntrovert.name: Lil Introvert
LilIntrovert.rulesText: Whenever this Penguin is flopped, boost its vibe by 7 for the rest of this Cycle.

SimonSmasher.name: Simon Smasher
SimonSmasher.rulesText: This Penguin can only [ACT] if you've played a Red Action this Cycle. [ACT] _F_: Choose a Relic and ice it.

LilJuggler.name: Lil Juggler
LilJuggler.rulesText: Enters flopped. [ACT] _F_: Choose an Action. Cancel it, return it to its owner's hand, and return this Penguin to its owner's hand.

LilZoomer.name: Lil Zoomer
LilZoomer.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, choose a non-Speedy Penguin and return it to its owner's hand.

LilInsomniac.name: Lil Insomniac
LilInsomniac.rulesText: Whenever you play a Red Action, put vibe counters on this Penguin equal to the Pudge cost of that Action.

PackAttack.name: Pack Attack
PackAttack.rulesText: Open a Vibes booster pack, reveal the cards, and put one of them into your hand. (A list of legal packs can be found at vibes.game/packattack).

TossUp.name: Toss Up
TossUp.rulesText: Flip a coin. If heads, draw a card. If tails, return this Action to your hand.

HoneyIShrunkThePengs.name: Honey, I Shrunk the Pengs
HoneyIShrunkThePengs.rulesText: Choose a Penguin. That Penguin becomes a Lil for the rest of this Cycle. Draw a card.

RideTheTrain.name: Ride the Train
RideTheTrain.rulesText: Draw a card. You may move any number of other cards named "Ride the Train" from your ice to the bottom of your deck. If you do, draw a card for each card moved this way.

EnterTheBounceHouseDimension.name: Enter the Bounce House Dimension
EnterTheBounceHouseDimension.rulesText: As an additional cost to play this Action, return a Rod you control to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

BandTogether.name: Band Together
BandTogether.rulesText: Search your deck for a Penguin card, reveal it, shuffle your deck, and put it on top.

GoodnightPengs.name: Goodnight, Pengs
GoodnightPengs.rulesText: Your opponent's Actions and [ACT]s cannot ice or flop Penguins in your huddle for the rest of this Cycle.

CrossTheRiver.name: Cross the River
CrossTheRiver.rulesText: Pick two non-Red Action cards in your ice and return them to your hand. This Action costs one less _R_ to play for each Action you've played this Cycle.

Sheeeesh.name: Sheeeesh!
Sheeeesh.rulesText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. This Action does nothing. Whenever you play a Red Action, return this card from your ice to your hand.

HeresPengy.name: Here's Pengy
HeresPengy.rulesText: Look at the top card of your opponent's deck. Draw a card.

LilPaper.name: Lil Paper
LilPaper.rulesText: Whenever you win Vibe Check, put 2 vibe counters on each Scissors Penguin.

LilRock.name: Lil Rock
LilRock.rulesText: Whenever you win Vibe Check, put 2 vibe counters on each Paper Penguin.

LilScissors.name: Lil Scissors
LilScissors.rulesText: Whenever you win Vibe Check, put 2 vibe counters on each Rock Penguin.

PenguinWithLilMystique.name: Penguin With Lil Mystique
PenguinWithLilMystique.rulesText: This Penguin doesn't participate in Vibe Check unless it has 6 or more vibe counters on it.

PoppinPete.name: Poppin' Pete
PoppinPete.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, you may choose a Relic with Fish cost 5 or less. If you do, return it to its owner's hand.

LilLifeguard.name: Lil Lifeguard
LilLifeguard.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, remove a vibe counter from this Penguin: Choose a Penguin and put 2 vibe counters on it.

LilStargazer.name: Lil Stargazer
LilStargazer.rulesText: Whenever this Penguin is chosen by anything, put a vibe counter on it.

LilExtrovert.name: Lil Extrovert
LilExtrovert.rulesText: Whenever a Penguin in your huddle gets vibe counters from anything non-Silly, put a vibe counter on it.

FrosterousTheGreat.name: Frosterous the Great
FrosterousTheGreat.rulesText: [ACT] _Y__G_, _F_: Choose a flopped Lil and ice it.

LilRaker.name: Lil Raker
LilRaker.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, pick two cards in your ice and put them on the bottom of your deck: Choose a Penguin and put 2 vibe counters on it.

LilWindowWasher.name: Lil Window Washer
LilWindowWasher.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, you may flop up to four other Yellow Penguins in your huddle. If you do, put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin for each Penguin flopped this way.

PenguinWhoRakes.name: Penguin Who Rakes
PenguinWhoRakes.rulesText: [ACT] _Y__Y__Y_, _F_: Choose a Penguin and put 3 vibe counters on it.

TheChampionOfClouds.name: The Champion of Clouds
TheChampionOfClouds.rulesText: Whenever another Lil enters a huddle, put a vibe counter on that Lil and put a vibe counter on this Lil.

JosephinePartyQueen.name: Josephine, Party Queen
JosephinePartyQueen.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: The next time you put a vibe counter on a Penguin this Cycle, draw a card.

SirWaddlesworth.name: Sir Waddlesworth
SirWaddlesworth.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, put 5 vibe counters on each Yellow Penguin in your huddle.

FlopDropAndRoll.name: Flop, Drop, and Roll
FlopDropAndRoll.rulesText: Choose a Lil or choose a Penguin with vibe 6 or less. Flop it.

SeeTheBerg.name: See the Berg
SeeTheBerg.rulesText: Choose a Penguin and put a vibe counter on it. Draw a card.

BeMerryAndGo.name: Be Merry and Go
BeMerryAndGo.rulesText: As an additional cost to play this Action, remove all of the vibe counters on a Penguin in your huddle. Choose a Penguin with Fish cost less than or equal to the number of counters you removed this way and ice it.

Frolic.name: Frolic
Frolic.rulesText: Choose three Penguins. Put 3 vibe counters on each of them.

IntoTheNight.name: Into the Night
IntoTheNight.rulesText: Choose an Action with Pudge cost less than or equal to the number of Lils in your huddle and cancel it.

DoALilMath.name: Do a Lil Math
DoALilMath.rulesText: Double the number of vibe counters on every Lil in your huddle.

Jeepers.name: Jeepers!
Jeepers.rulesText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose a Lil with no vibe counters. Return it to its owner's hand.

Wen.name: Wen?
Wen.rulesText: Wen you draw this card, you may reveal it. If you do, choose up to one Penguin and put a vibe counter on it.

LilBaker.name: Lil Baker
LilBaker.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, pick two cards in your ice and put them on the bottom of your deck: You get a Fishsicle.

LilSkydiver.name: Lil Skydiver
LilSkydiver.rulesText: Whenever this Penguin wins Vibe Check, you get a Fishsicle.

PenguinWhoBakes.name: Penguin Who Bakes
PenguinWhoBakes.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, you get a Fishsicle.

TubbinsTheBold.name: Tubbins the Bold
TubbinsTheBold.rulesText: [ACT] _G__P_, _F_: Choose a flopped Lil and ice it.

LilPainter.name: Lil Painter
LilPainter.rulesText: Whenever you play your first Action each Cycle, you get a Fishsicle.

SamanthaFeathersPopIdol.name: Samantha Feathers, Pop Idol
SamanthaFeathersPopIdol.rulesText: You can only pay this Penguin's Fish cost with Fishsicles.

LilChef.name: Lil Chef
LilChef.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, put a vibe counter on it. [ACT] _F_, remove a vibe counter from this Penguin: You get a Fishsicle.

TheSaviorOfSkies.name: The Savior of Skies
TheSaviorOfSkies.rulesText: This Penguin's vibe is twice the number of Lils in your huddle.

LilWhoCantStopEating.name: Lil Who Can't Stop Eating
LilWhoCantStopEating.rulesText: Whenever you use a Fishsicle, put a vibe counter on this Penguin.

SonOfLil.name: Son of Lil
SonOfLil.rulesText: Whenever you get Fishsicles from anything non-Silly, you get an additional Fishsicle.

DimaTheDestroyer.name: Dima the Destroyer
DimaTheDestroyer.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Relic and ice it. If it was a Relic you controlled, you get a Fishsicle.

LilLodger.name: Lil Lodger
LilLodger.rulesText: At the end of Action Time, put vibe counters on this Penguin equal to the number of Fishsicles you have.

MissTweeny.name: Miss Tweeny
MissTweeny.rulesText: Whenever you win Vibe Check, double the number of Fishsicles you have.

SirVibesalil.name: Sir Vibesalil
SirVibesalil.rulesText: Fishsicles used to pay this card's Fish cost count for 2 Fish. At the start of Action Time, draw a card.

FishingTrip.name: Fishing Trip
FishingTrip.rulesText: Flop all Penguins in your huddle. You get a Fishsicle for each Green Penguin flopped this way.

MysteryOfTheEverlastingFish.name: Mystery of the Everlasting Fish
MysteryOfTheEverlastingFish.rulesText: You get a Fishsicle. Whenever you use a Fishsicle, if this card is in your ice, return it to your hand.

OverwhelmWithFish.name: Overwhelm With Fish
OverwhelmWithFish.rulesText: Choose a Penguin. If its vibe is equal to or less than the number of Fishsicles you have, ice it.

BeALilEvil.name: Be a Lil Evil
BeALilEvil.rulesText: As an additional cost to play this Action, ice a card from your hand.  Choose an Action with a single choice, cancel it, and copy that Action. (You make new choices for the copy).

BeWeirdAndSilly.name: Be Weird and Silly
BeWeirdAndSilly.rulesText: Choose an Action, cancel it, and return it to its owner's hand. Draw a card. You get a Fishsicle.

CaptureTheMoment.name: Capture the Moment
CaptureTheMoment.rulesText: Choose a Penguin. Unflop it and put vibe counters on it equal to the number of Fishsicles you have.

LookInside.name: Look Inside
LookInside.rulesText: Choose a Penguin, Relic, or Rod. Return it to its owner's hand. Its owner ices a card from their hand.

NoWay.name: No Way!
NoWay.rulesText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose a Penguin with vibe 3 or less and ice it.

LilGardenkeeper.name: Lil Gardenkeeper
LilGardenkeeper.rulesText: Whenever a Location enters play, you get a Fishsicle.

LilWhoHoops.name: Lil Who Hoops
LilWhoHoops.rulesText: At the end of Action Time, ice this Penguin. [ACT] _F_: Draw a card.

LilContemplator.name: Lil Contemplator
LilContemplator.rulesText: Whenever any number of Lils become unflopped, put a vibe counter on this Penguin.

LilMilkmaid.name: Lil Milkmaid
LilMilkmaid.rulesText: This Penguin's vibe is twice the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

LilWaker.name: Lil Waker
LilWaker.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, pick two cards in your ice and put them on the bottom of your deck: Choose a flopped non-Silly Penguin and unflop it.

TinaWhoTears.name: Tina Who Tears
TinaWhoTears.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, you may choose a Relic. If you do, turn it face-down as a Rod.

TheHeraldOfHorizons.name: The Herald of Horizons
TheHeraldOfHorizons.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Boost the vibe of every Lil in your huddle by 2 for the rest of this Cycle.

LilJelly.name: Lil Jelly
LilJelly.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, ice a card from your hand: Draw a card.

BlizzbyTheSwift.name: Blizzby the Swift
BlizzbyTheSwift.rulesText: [ACT] _B__Y_, _F_: Choose a flopped Lil and ice it.

PenguinWhoWakes.name: Penguin Who Wakes
PenguinWhoWakes.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a flopped non-Silly Lil and unflop it.

LilMocker.name: liL mOCkeR
LilMocker.rulesText: Whenever this Penguin becomes unflopped, if it's not at the Unfloppening, choose a Penguin and flop it.

Marilyl.name: Marilyl
Marilyl.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, each player ices the top two cards of their deck.

BinkusWhoEatsTheStars.name: Binkus, Who Eats the Stars
BinkusWhoEatsTheStars.rulesText: Playable from ice. As you play Binkus, put up to thirteen cards from your opponent's ice on the bottom of their deck to reduce Binkus' cost by that amount. Binkus' vibe is twice the number of Penguin cards in your opponent's ice.

LilDragonrider.name: Lil Dragonrider
LilDragonrider.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, pick up to two cards in your opponent's ice and put them on top of their deck in any order. (Your opponent knows the order).

IsThisARod.name: Is This a Rod
IsThisARod.rulesText: Choose a Rod. Return it to its owner's hand. If it wasn't a Rod you owned, its owner gets a Fishsicle.

AnOfferYouCantRefuse.name: An Offer You Can't Refuse
AnOfferYouCantRefuse.rulesText: Choose an unflopped Lil. Put it on top of its owner's deck.

OooShiny.name: Ooo, Shiny
OooShiny.rulesText: Choose a Lil or choose a Penguin with vibe 6 or less. At the end of Action Time, unflop that Penguin.

TieGame.name: Tie Game
TieGame.rulesText: Each player ices a Penguin in their huddle.

WinTheRace.name: Win the Race
WinTheRace.rulesText: Choose a flopped Penguin in your huddle and unflop it. Ice that Penguin at the end of this Cycle.

GoWithTheFlow.name: Go With the Flow
GoWithTheFlow.rulesText: Each player draws cards equal to the number of unflopped Lils in their huddle.

TurnToRod.name: Turn to Rod
TurnToRod.rulesText: Choose a Penguin and turn it face-down as a Rod.

FourOfAKind.name: Four of a Kind
FourOfAKind.rulesText: Choose four Penguins in your huddle with the same name. You win the game.

ForceOfLil.name: Force of Lil
ForceOfLil.rulesText: Choose an Action and cancel it. You may play this Action without paying its Pudge cost if there are at least five flopped Lils in your huddle.

Inconceivable.name: Inconceivable!
Inconceivable.rulesText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose a Lil and a non-Lil Penguin. Unflop those Penguins.

LilQuaker.name: Lil Quaker
LilQuaker.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, pick two Location cards in your ice and put them on the bottom of your deck: Draw a card.

PenguinWhoQuakes.name: Penguin Who Quakes
PenguinWhoQuakes.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, reveal the top card of your deck. If it's a Relic card with Fish cost 4 or less, draw it. If not, put it on the bottom of your deck.

LilLucky.name: Lil Lucky
LilLucky.rulesText: Whenever another Purple Penguin  in your huddle or a Relic you control is iced, you get a Fishsicle.

LilSoloAdventurer.name: Lil Solo Adventurer
LilSoloAdventurer.rulesText: Whenever a Location enters play, draw a card. Whenever another Lil Solo Adventurer enters a huddle, ice this Penguin.

LilSpaceCadet.name: Lil Space Cadet
LilSpaceCadet.rulesText: This Penguin's vibe is twice the number of Relic cards in your ice.

LilSurprised.name: Lil Surprised
LilSurprised.rulesText: Whenever a Location enters play, put 2 vibe counters on this Penguin.

BeckyBreaker.name: Becky Breaker
BeckyBreaker.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Relic you don't control. Swap it with a Relic card in its owner's ice.

PebblingtonTheBrave.name: Pebblington the Brave
PebblingtonTheBrave.rulesText: [ACT] _P__R_, _F_: Choose a flopped Lil and ice it.

LilDetective.name: Lil Detective
LilDetective.rulesText: Whenever you draw a card, put a vibe counter on this Penguin.

LilLookout.name: Lil Lookout
LilLookout.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, search your deck for a Location card, reveal it, shuffle your deck, and put it second from the top.

TheWardenOfWind.name: The Warden of Wind
TheWardenOfWind.rulesText: Whenever a Lil wins Vibe Check, its controller draws a card.

BeBigAndGoofy.name: Be Big and Goofy
BeBigAndGoofy.rulesText: Choose a Lil. That Penguin is no longer a Lil for the rest of this Cycle. Draw a card.

LilWhoSlides.name: Lil Who Slides
LilWhoSlides.rulesText: Whenever this Penguin is chosen, ice it.

LilWhosDownBad.name: Lil Who's Down Bad
LilWhosDownBad.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, each player draws a card.

LilDrippy.name: Lil Drippy
LilDrippy.rulesText: This Penguin can only [ACT] if you control a Location. [ACT] _F_: Pick a Location card in your ice with a different name than the Location in play. Put it into play.

PetitePourer.name: Petite Pourer
PetitePourer.rulesText: Whenever you play a Relic, choose a Penguin and flop it.

LilWhoScoops.name: Lil Who Scoops
LilWhoScoops.rulesText: When this Penguin enters the huddle, each player may ice a Relic they control. If they do, they draw a card.

PhoneHome.name: Phone Home
PhoneHome.rulesText: Choose a Penguin and a Location. Ice the one with the lower Fish cost. If there's a tie, ice them both.

ThrowSomeSnow.name: Throw Some Snow
ThrowSomeSnow.rulesText: Choose a Penguin with an [ACT]. Ice that Penguin.

Distract.name: Distract
Distract.rulesText: Pick a card in your ice. Return it to your hand.

CheekySidequest.name: Cheeky Sidequest
CheekySidequest.rulesText: Choose a Location. Search your deck for a Location card with Fish cost 1 greater than the chosen Location's Fish cost. Put it into play. Shuffle your deck.

NotToday.name: Not Today!
NotToday.rulesText: You can only play this Action if it's face-down as a Rod. Flip this card over to play it. Choose an Action and cancel it. Its controller draws two cards.

BuildABurrito.name: Build a Burrito
BuildABurrito.rulesText: Choose an Action and cancel it. Put it on top of its owner's deck.

LayerALasagna.name: Layer a Lasagna
LayerALasagna.rulesText: Choose a Lil with vibe 5 or less or a non-Lil Penguin with vibe 5 or greater and ice it.

FlipAFlapjack.name: Flip a Flapjack
FlipAFlapjack.rulesText: Choose a Lil with vibe 1. Return it to its owner's hand. Draw a card.

MeltAMarshmallow.name: Melt a Marshmallow
MeltAMarshmallow.rulesText: Reveal the top three cards of your deck. Pick one and draw it. Put the rest on the bottom of your deck.

DunkADonut.name: Dunk a Donut
DunkADonut.rulesText: Pick an Action card in your ice. Until the end of this Cycle, you can play that Action. If that Action would be put into your ice this Cycle, put it on the bottom of your deck instead.

LilBellyacher.name: Lil Bellyacher
LilBellyacher.rulesText: [ACT] _F_, ice another Penguin in your huddle: Search your deck for a Lil Penguin card with Fish cost  1 greater than the Fish cost of the Penguin you iced. Put it into your huddle. Shuffle your deck.

PenguinWhoseBellyAches.name: Penguin Whose Belly Aches
PenguinWhoseBellyAches.rulesText: [ACT] _F_: Choose a Rod you control and return it to its owner's hand.

OperaHouse.name: Opera House
OperaHouse.rulesText: At the start of Action Time, each player with exactly six cards in their hand draws a card. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

MountFuji.name: Mount Fuji
MountFuji.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, each player names a Penguin card. Penguins with those names lose all abilities. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

HalfPastChill.name: Half Past Chill
HalfPastChill.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, choose a Penguin and put a vibe counter on it.

GlowAndBehold.name: Glow and Behold
GlowAndBehold.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, choose a Penguin and put a vibe counter on it.

FeatherForecast.name: Feather Forecast
FeatherForecast.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, choose a Penguin and put a vibe counter on it.

StatueOfLiberty.name: Statue of Liberty
StatueOfLiberty.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, each player chooses a Penguin in their huddle. Put them under this card until it leaves play. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

PotionCommotion.name: Potion Commotion
PotionCommotion.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, choose a Penguin and put a vibe counter on it.

GlassAct.name: Glass Act
GlassAct.rulesText: When this Relic enters play, choose a Penguin and put a vibe counter on it.

EasterIsland.name: Easter Island
EasterIsland.rulesText: Whenever a player plays an Action, that player boosts the vibes of Penguins in their huddle by 1 for the rest of this Cycle. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

LeaningTower.name: Leaning Tower
LeaningTower.rulesText: Flopped Penguins now participate in Vibe Check, and unflopped Penguins do not participate in Vibe Check. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

EiffelTower.name: Eiffel Tower
EiffelTower.rulesText: Enter the Huddle abilities trigger twice. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

Pongo.name: Pongo
Pongo.rulesText: When Pongo enters the huddle, put 8 vibe counters on it. Pongo doesn't participate in Vibe Check. Whenever you play an Action, remove a vibe counter from Pongo. If it was the last one, search your deck for a Penguin card,

NyanCat.name: Nyan Cat
NyanCat.rulesText: When Nyan Cat enters the huddle, put 2 vibe counters on it. Whenever Nyan Cat is flopped, remove a vibe counter from it.

Sphinx.name: Sphinx
Sphinx.rulesText: Whenever a Penguin enters a huddle, its controller draws a card. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

GreatWall.name: Great Wall
GreatWall.rulesText: Whenever a player plays an Action, that player copies that Action and makes new choices for the copy. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

Colosseum.name: Colosseum
Colosseum.rulesText: Players may look at and play the top card of their decks. Players cannot play cards from anywhere else. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

Arches.name: Arches
Arches.rulesText: Whenever a Penguin is flopped, its owner gets a Fishsicle. Whenever another Location enters play, ice this Relic.

ParasolRod.name: Parasol Rod
ParasolRod.rulesText: When this Rod enters play, choose a Rod and unflop it.

BaronFavor.name: Baron's Favor
BaronFavor.rulesText: Indicates which player currently holds the Baron's Favor. Does not count toward the 15-permanent win condition.
